title: BetterHUD(Popr4x)
description: This is a texture pack that improves minecraft's hud by reducing transparency for better visibility and adds numbers to slots 1 to 9.
body:
This is a texture pack that improves minecraft's hud by reducing transparency for better visibility and adds numbers to slots 1 to 9.

It also adds some other features such as a custom redstone texture and a custom animated item texture for campfires.

made with <3 by Popr4x.
